examples: Well here is a passage from a letter from a gentleman to his friend in Adumbral that Hume wrote in 1775.
The context of this was that Hume was applying for a chair in moral philosophy at Adumbral and the clergy at Adumbral was very much against him.
Aiming at the choosing of the form and the material, give and explain the suggestion based on the general choice to the architectural adumbral system on the different conditions.
